title: Domain 3: Design High-Performing Architectures (24%)
description: Choose the right compute, storage, and database for the workload, and use caching and content delivery to keep things fast at scale.

lessons.title: Scalable and High-Performing Compute
objectives: Match EC2 instance families to a workload's bottleneck
Scale horizontally with Auto Scaling behind a load balancer
Choose Lambda or Fargate to cut operational overhead

lessons.title: Choosing Storage and Databases
objectives: Choose between S3, EBS, EFS, FSx, and instance store
Pick the right database: RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, or Redshift
Distinguish read replicas (scaling reads) from Multi-AZ (availability)

lessons.title: Caching and Content Delivery
objectives: Use CloudFront to cache content close to users
Add ElastiCache or DAX to speed up reads
Tell CloudFront (content caching) apart from Global Accelerator (network path)
